Summary: [GrowMate] Data Readiness for MVP + Phase 2 UI
Epic Name: [GrowMate] Data Readiness for MVP + Phase 2 UI
Description: Goal: Ensure frontend UI and backend responses remain stable for MVP and Phase 2. In scope: quiz templates, diagnosis scenarios, intervention catalog, thresholds and config, enum freeze, QA golden datasets. Epic AC: all 6 stories done; staging seed validated; mandatory API fields stable; data dictionary approved by Backend and Frontend.

Summary: [MVP][Data Pack 1] Seed quiz_question_template for THPT Derivative
Description: Objective: provide clean quiz data for 3 question types. Target table: public.quiz_question_template. Volume: >=20 active derivative questions with distribution MULTIPLE_CHOICE>=8, TRUE_FALSE_CLUSTER>=4, SHORT_ANSWER>=8. Contract rules: valid question_type; part_no aligned by type; payload shape complete per type. AC: >=20 valid active rows, zero invalid payload rows, no schema constraint violations, frontend fetch returns mixed types. Deliverables: SQL seed, row-count report, payload validation report.

Summary: [MVP][Data Pack 2] Build diagnosis scenario dataset for normal/hitl/recovery
Description: Objective: provide stable diagnosis payload content for major UI branches. Required scenarios: normal_success, hitl_pending, recovery_mode, fallback_safe. Mandatory fields: diagnosisId, title, gapAnalysis, diagnosisReason, strengths, needsReview, confidence, riskLevel, mode, requiresHITL, nextSuggestedTopic, interventionPlan. AC: all 4 scenarios pass backend schema validation, no null mandatory fields, requiresHITL=true exists in hitl_pending, mode=recovery exists in recovery scenario. Deliverables: scenario JSON bundle and scenario-to-UI mapping sheet. Dependency: align with enum freeze before final sign-off.

Summary: [MVP][Data Pack 3] Create intervention option catalog for academic and recovery flows
Description: Objective: provide intervention plans renderable by UI. Required fields per option: id, title, type. Required type coverage: review, practice, recovery, breath, grounding. AC: non-empty id-title-type for all options, no duplicate ids, at least 2 options for normal mode and 2 options for recovery mode, skip_once fallback mapping documented. Deliverables: catalog JSON and mode-to-option mapping table. Dependency: diagnosis scenarios.

Summary: [MVP/Phase2][Data Pack 4] Define runtime thresholds and expert config for decisions
Description: Objective: centralize thresholds for backend decision logic. Required knobs: idle_time_high_seconds, uncertainty_hitl_threshold, risk-level mapping from confidence or uncertainty, fallback strategy priority. AC: config loadable without code changes, version and created_at tracked, decision output reproducible for same input. Deliverables: versioned config JSON v1 and threshold changelog. Dependencies: diagnosis scenarios and QA golden dataset.

Summary: [MVP][Data Pack 5] Freeze enums and publish data dictionary
Description: Objective: prevent UI breakage due to naming drift. Freeze values: question_type=MULTIPLE_CHOICE|TRUE_FALSE_CLUSTER|SHORT_ANSWER; mode=normal|recovery|hitl_pending; riskLevel=low|medium|high; intervention type=review|practice|recovery|breath|grounding; event names=Plan Accepted|Plan Rejected. AC: single source of truth published, Backend and Data agree exact enum values, no unresolved naming conflicts. Deliverables: data dictionary v1 and enum freeze approval note in Jira.

Summary: [MVP/Phase2][Data Pack 6] Build golden datasets for E2E QA and demo regression
Description: Objective: enable deterministic QA for critical branches. Required cases: correct answer to normal diagnosis to academic intervention; high uncertainty to HITL pending and confirm path; high idle signal to recovery mode; fallback-safe when plan is missing or partial. AC: all 4 cases executable in staging, expected outputs deterministic, QA can validate pass/fail without manual interpretation. Deliverables: golden dataset JSON, expected outcome matrix, regression checklist. Dependencies: stories 1 through 5.
